hero.subheadline: We provide the infrastructure, strategy, and community to help you grow on your own terms. No quotas. No pressure. No predatory contracts.

services.title: Technical & Aesthetic
services.description: Full-spectrum broadcast optimization. We refine your lighting architecture, camera positioning, and audio processing to maximize viewer retention from the first second.

services.title: Data-Driven Strategy
services.description: Algorithmic positioning based on real-time analytics. We optimize your stream hooks and retention loops to capture and hold platform-wide momentum.

services.title: Admin & Account Safety
services.description: Direct handling of platform policy and account security. We manage ban appeals, flag resolution, and compliance so you can focus exclusively on creation.

services.title: The Exit Guarantee
services.description: Total creator autonomy. You retain 100% control over your account. If you choose to leave, we facilitate a clean transition with no hidden restrictions.

services.title: Zero-Pressure Policy
services.description: No mandatory hours or performance benchmarks. We provide the infrastructure; you decide the pace. Our support remains constant regardless of your streaming volume.

services.title: Education Center
services.description: Exclusive access to our private resource library. Over 50+ modules covering advanced TikTok LIVE strategy, technical setup, and community management.

growthPhases.title: Three phases.
growthPhases.description: Every creator moves through the same journey. We know exactly how to guide each phase.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.role: The baseline for professional broadcasting. We audit your technical environment to ensure your setup meets the high-fidelity standards required for elite platform push.

phases.name: Engagement
phases.role: Transitioning from technical stability to psychological reach. We focus on viewer retention patterns and interaction loops that trigger the platform's distribution algorithm.

phases.name: Expansion
phases.role: Scaling your influence into a sustainable ecosystem. This phase refines your relationship with your core audience to drive consistent growth and long-term monetization.

growthPhases.bottomCallout: Growth at your pace. Transparent by design. Built for creators.

items.quote: Joining Peace Time was the single best decision for my streaming career. The data insights and community support are unmatched.

rosterSettings.mainDescription: The Peace Time roster is home to the most dedicated, high-growth creators on TikTok LIVE. We provide the infrastructure; they provide the talent.

agencyStaff.title: Agency Staff
agencyStaff.desc: The leadership driving Peace Time Agency.

newests.title: Peace Time's Newests
newests.desc: The latest additions to our roster.

allCreators.title: Peace Time Creators
allCreators.desc: The talent of Peace Time Agency.

faqs.q: What are the expectations and quotas?
faqs.a: None. Peace Time operates on a Zero-Pressure Policy: no minimum hours, no gifting benchmarks, and no quotas. We provide the tools; you determine the velocity.

faqs.q: How do I join the agency?
faqs.a: Submission is handled via TikTok's official agency portal. There are no external legal traps or side-contracts. Once we invite you, everything is finalized securely within the app.
Never. We operate exclusively within the official TikTok Agency framework. Transparency is core to our model: no hidden clauses, and no fine print beyond TikTok's standard platform terms.

faqs.q: What happens if I decide to leave?
faqs.a: You retain full account ownership. You can leave at any time, subject only to TikTok's own platform-mandated 60-day transition window which applies to all agency moves.

faqs.q: What does the agency actually do for my stream?
faqs.a: We provide professional technical audits, data-driven strategy sessions, and 24/7 administrative support for account safety and platform compliance.

faqs.q: What do I get immediately upon joining?
faqs.a: Instant access to our 50+ module Education Center, a full technical setup audit, and entry into our private Discord network for strategy and collaboration.

footer.tagline: The elite hub for TikTok LIVE creators.

creators.name: Baked
creators.title: Founder
creators.description: Hi, I’m Nick, founder of Peace Time Agency. I work directly with creators to help them grow on TikTok LIVE through stream strategy, setup guidance, and community support. My goal is simple, help creators stay consistent, improve their content, and turn streaming into real opportunity.

creators.name: OopsItsJRPGTime
creators.description: Hello there my name is OopsItsJRPGTime or "Oops" for short! If I were to have to describe myself as a vibe it would have to be "Chill." I stream mostly JRPG Games from classic to new and anywhere in between! I first fell in love with Jrpg games back on the SNES with my very first game ever Breath of Fire and from then on I was hooked! My goal for streaming has always been to make amazing friends, so will you be my friend?!

creators.name: Mr. Lefty the Hand
creators.description: I’m Mr. Lefty, a hand that somehow ended up flying planes, driving tanks, and making questionable tactical decisions in War Thunder. Whether it’s clutch moments, terrible aim, or Gaijin doing Gaijin things, Lefty’s here for random bits of chaos along the way.

creators.name: Trash (aka Lindsey)
creators.description: Lindsey, also known as Trash (@TrashSoupGaming), is a full-time TikTok streamer who focuses on story-driven games like RPGs and well-written horror. Over time, she has built a strong, loyal community that doesn’t just show up for the games, but for the conversations, reactions, and shared experiences that happen during every stream. Lindsey believes that growth on TikTok LIVE isn’t just about numbers. It’s about building a space where people want to come back, where viewers feel part of something, and where creators can develop confidence in what they’re doing. For Lindsey, streaming isn’t just about going live. It’s about helping others find their place and grow along the way.
creators.title: Manager

creators.name: Papa J
creators.description: Just a gamer from Wyoming. I've been gaming since the Atari 2600 lol. Mostly I stream War Thunder but will occasionally change it up with something different.

creators.name: ItsJakee_78
creators.description: I’m a gaming creator posting Warzone gameplay, gaming memes, and fun squad moments.

creators.name: Jessica
creators.title: Group Leader
creators.description:
Hey! I’m Jessica, aka TheJ3ssExpress. I’m a recruiter and The Creator Retention Manager with Peacetime, where I help support and grow creators on TikTok. Seeing creators succeed is something I’m really passionate about.

On my own streams, you’ll usually find me cozy gaming while jamming to some rock or EDM. Every now and then I’ll dive into a horror game and suffer through a few jumpscares. I also like to pop in with occasional IRL lives whether it’s just chatting or a “cook dinner with me” stream.

creators.name: General Spuds
creators.title: General Manager
creators.description: HI! I am general Spuds. I have been creating for years and play a variety of games from FPS to RPGS. I enjoy creating a positive environment and inspiring the people I meet. Rather I am streaming or helping another creator, I love lifting people up. Positive times and Vibes

creators.name: STEALYN
creators.title: Recruiter
creators.description: The Content Coach with no fluff, Stealyn believes great creators are built through knowledge, positivity, and mental fortitude. He is a War Thunder VR creator by passion and a blue-collar worker by trade; he knows the value of discipline, balance, and consistency. Here at PeaceTime, his focus is to build strategies around YOUR success as an individual creator! He’s not looking for just anybody; he’s looking for those ready to earn their place as an Agent of PeaceTime.

creators.name: Internet Tour Guide
creators.description: Internet Tour Guide is a creator with rare range: live energy, real audience interaction, and genuinely high-production content off-stream, all backed by the discipline to build both a personal brand and a daily content business for small business owners that don't want to become influencers to survive. Take the Tour :v:
